sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36637" key="e)calge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαλγέω</orth>, c. acc., <sense id="n36637.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer pain in,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοὺς πόδας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.27</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
